name: Tool Battery Charging Roster
description: Create a practical charging roster for cordless tool batteries, chargers, labels, rotation status, storage locations, and basic fire-safe charging reminders without giving electrical repair guidance.
use_cases: Track cordless tool batteries by label, platform, status, and location.
Create a charger map and charging queue for a workshop or garage.
Add basic fire-safe charging reminders without repair instructions.
safety_notes: Organization and basic fire-safe charging reminders only; follow manufacturer instructions.
Do not provide electrical repair, live testing, battery rebuilding, wiring, soldering, plug modification, or charger modification guidance.
Use only compatible battery and charger combinations; hold unknown items for manual or manufacturer check.
Stop using batteries or chargers with swelling, leaks, smoke, burning smell, unusual heat, damaged casing, damaged cords, corrosion, or repeated error lights.
